name: hreflang-international
description: > International / multilingual SEO audit focused on hreflang correctness. Detects and diagnoses the most common (and ranking-damaging) hreflang mistakes: missing or broken return tags, wrong language/region codes, missing x-default, self-referencing errors, conflicts between hreflang and canonical, and inconsistent signals across HTML head / HTTP headers / XML sitemap. Also reviews the broader international setup — URL structure (ccTLD vs subdirectory vs subdomain), language targeting, and geo s
author: nowork-studio
